title: Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva is located at Avanur, Thrissur district, Kerala.
overview.description: Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva is located at Avanur, Thrissur district, Kerala. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva. It is believed that this temple is one of the 108 Shiva temples of Kerala and is installed by sage Parasurama dedicated to Shiva.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thangalur
topPlaces.description: Thangalur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Avanur
topPlaces.description: Avanur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Avanur is around 3 km east of the Thrissur-Kunnamkulam highway from Mundur junction and around 8 to 9 km from Thrissur town.

topPlaces.name: Choolissery
topPlaces.description: Choolissery is a residential township in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is surrounded by paddy fields and is 5 mins drive away from Thrissur city .

topPlaces.name: Anjur
topPlaces.description: Anjur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Mundathikode
topPlaces.description: Mundathicode is a village in Wadakkanchery municipality, Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Mundayur Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Mundayur Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: മുണ്ടയൂർ മഹാദേവർ ക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva at Anjur of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India. The temple is situated near to SH-69 (Thrissur - Kuttippuram road) at Mundayur village.

topPlaces.name: Peringandoor
topPlaces.description: Peringandoor is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Talappilly, Chavakkad, Kodungallur, Mukundapuram, Thrissur etc.

topPlaces.name: Karuvathoor Sreeramaswami Temple
topPlaces.description: Karuvathoor Sree Ramaswamy Temple is a Hindu temple located at Kurumaldesam in the Velur panchayat of Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. This temple is located close to the Kurumal Sree Bhagawati Temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (72 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thangalur, Avanur, Choolissery, Anjur, Mundathikode.
